title: Literal suffix L for long integers shall be upper case
description: Literal suffix "L" for long integers shall be upper caseAnalyze your codeconsistency-identifiablemaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEconventionbased-on-misracertpitfallWhy is this an issue?More InfoUsing upper case literal suffixes removes the potential ambiguity between "1" (digit 1) and "l" (letter el) for declaring literals.Noncompliant code exampleconst int a = 0u; // Noncompliant const int b = 0l; // Noncompliant const int c = 0Ul; // Noncompliant const int d = 0x12bu; // Noncompliant const float m = 1.2f; // Noncompliant const float n = 1.2l; // NoncompliantCompliant solutionconst int a = 0U; const int b = 0L; const int c = 0UL; const int d = 0x12bU; const float m = 1.2F; const float n = 1.2L;Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your I
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

noncompliant:
const int        a = 0u;      // Noncompliant
const int        b = 0l;      // Noncompliant
const int        c = 0Ul;     // Noncompliant
const int        d = 0x12bu;  // Noncompliant
const float      m = 1.2f;    // Noncompliant
const float      n = 1.2l;    // Noncompliant
